context.role: Optional decorative texture layer above ground line to add visual interest without cluttering gameplay
context.screen_position: Horizontal strip at y=0px to y=10px (above ground line), spans entire screen width with tiling
context.usage_scenario: Optional visual enhancement, scrolls right-to-left at Current_Speed (300-900 px/s) synchronized with ground_line, tiles seamlessly

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal strip with sparse small rocks or grass tufts
visual_specification.texture: Minimal pixel art pattern with small decorative elements (rocks/grass) spaced 50-100px apart

animation.description: Horizontal scrolling at -Current_Speed px/s, tiles seamlessly when X < -1200px by resetting X += 1200px, synchronized with ground_line

visual_specification.details: Sparse decorative elements (small rocks or grass tufts) in Primary color, low visual density to avoid distraction, seamless tiling pattern

relationships.shared_with: Same scrolling speed and tiling behavior as ground_line
relationships.differences_from: ground_line is mandatory 2px line, ground_texture is optional 10px decorative strip, ground_texture has sparse pattern while ground_line is solid

explicit_negations: No dense or complex patterns (keep sparse)
No bright or contrasting colors (Primary #535353 only)
No overlapping with player or obstacle sprites
